column12: Semantic Network Analysis of Online Media
column13: This document discloses a system and method for predicting business performance by analyzing the ethical behaviors of individuals and teams within organizations. The system utilizes machine learning algorithms to analyze communication patterns and word usage in emails and social media posts, categorizing individuals into ‘bee’, ‘ant’, or ‘leech’ behavioral types. By correlating these behavioral types with various performance metrics, the system provides insights into the impact of ethical behaviors on organizational success. This automated approach overcomes the limitations of traditional survey-based methods, offering a more objective and scalable solution for assessing and managing ethical behaviors in diverse organizational contexts.

column12: Social network analysis method based on relation graph
column13: The invention discloses a social network analysis method based on a relation graph. The method comprises the steps of data acquisition; rapid acquisition of target social network data is completed through a data acquisition engine; key objects are monitored; key monitoring is carried out on concerned objects, key organizations and key websites which need to be concerned in actual business work, so that the network dynamic state of a target object is mastered in real time; analyzing and expanding the relation; the method comprises the following steps: performing intimacy calculation and personnel and organization relationship analysis on a specified social network platform account in collected data, and performing line expansion analysis again according to an analysis result, so as to continuously perfect a relationship graph; exporting and pushing the report; and dynamically presenting a relation analysis result graph by adopting a visualization technology. According to the method, the defects in the prior art are overcome, the database is formed by collecting whole-network data in real time, the knowledge graph is constructed through automatic analysis and classification, intelligent application and manual research and judgment are combined, and efficient intelligence landing is achieved.

column12: METHODS AND SYSTEMS FOR ANOMALY AND PATTERN DETECTION OF UNSTRUCTURED BIG DATA
column13: A computing system includes: a memory, containing instructions for a method for anomaly and pattern detection of unstructured big data via semantic analysis and dynamic knowledge graph construction; a processor, coupled with the memory and, when the instructions being executed, configured to: receive unstructured big data associated with social network interactions, events, or activities; parse and structure the unstructured big data to generate structured big data; form a dynamic knowledge base based on the structured big data; and perform sematic reasoning on the dynamic knowledge base to discover patterns and anomalies among the social network interactions, events, or activities; and a display, comprising an interactive graphical user interface (GUI), configured to receive the anomalies and patterns to display real-time actionable alerts, provide recommendations, and support decisions.

column12: Social network division method and system based on single-source parallel walk
column13: The invention discloses a social network division method and system based on single-source parallel walk, and belongs to the technical field of social network analysis. The method comprises the following steps: S1, checking unaccessed vertexes in a social network, and selecting a vertex with the highest vertex degree as a source point for access; s2, performing single-source parallel migration based on the source point to determine a large connection component where the source point is located; s3, under the condition that the sum of the vertex degrees of all the accessed vertexes is not greater than the number of the connecting edges of the knowledge graph, executing the step S1 again; s4, under the condition that the sum of the vertex degrees of all accessed vertexes is greater than the number of connecting edges of the knowledge graph, determining a small connected component linked by each large connected component; and S5, obtaining a social network division result according to the large connectivity component and the small connectivity component. According to the invention, the synchronous communication overhead is reduced, and efficient and extensible community discovery is realized.

column12: Group member relationship analysis method based on knowledge graph
column13: The invention discloses a group member relationship analysis method based on a knowledge graph, and belongs to the technical field of social network analysis. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring interaction information among group members, defining different numerical values for representing the intensity of the interaction for different interaction behaviors, performing repeated integration on repeated interaction according to the intensity of the interaction, and constructing a knowledge graph based on the relationship among the group members; obtaining key members based on the knowledge graph; key member nodes are deleted in the graph, the average influence of the group is calculated, the influence degree of deletion of each key member on the influence of the group is compared, and finally main members and secondary members in the group members are obtained; the method can consider the complexity of the character relationship.

column12: Knowledge graph event activity sorting method based on social network
column13: The invention discloses a social network-based knowledge graph event vitality sequencing method, which comprises the following steps of: S1, acquiring knowledge graph events in a social network; s2, obtaining each knowledge graph event activity score through an iterative knowledge graph event sorting algorithm; and S3, sorting each knowledge graph event through the vitality score. According to the method, the active knowledge graph event is obtained, and the information is pushed to the active knowledge graph event, so that more benefits are brought to the social network site.

column12: INFUSING KNOWLEDGE INTO NATURAL LANGUAGE PROCESSING TASKS USING GRAPH STRUCTURES
column13: One embodiment of the invention provides a method for natural language processing (NLP). The method comprises extracting knowledge outside of text content of a NLP instance by extracting a set of subgraphs from a knowledge graph associated with the text content. The set of subgraphs comprises the knowledge. The method further comprises encoding the knowledge with the text content into a fixed size graph representation by filtering and encoding the set of subgraphs. The method further comprises applying a text embedding algorithm to the text content to generate a fixed size text representation, and classifying the text content based on the fixed size graph representation and the fixed size text representation.

column12: Large-scale social network influence prediction system and method
column13: The invention relates to the technical field of social network analysis and influence prediction, and discloses a large-scale social network influence prediction system and method.The large-scale social network influence prediction method comprises the steps that a multi-language knowledge graph alignment system is constructed, and accurate mapping of cross-language concept nodes is achieved; constructing a culture vector space representation system, and extracting culture features from the social network user behavior data; the resonance intensity calculation between the content and the culture vector is realized, and the resonance intensity of the content in a specific culture environment is quantified; realizing culture gene transmission dynamics simulation, decomposing the content into transmissible culture gene units, and simulating the transmission process of the culture gene units; fusing prediction results to realize accurate influence evaluation; the technical problems that an existing social network influence prediction technology is inaccurate in prediction in a cross-language environment and neglects a culture resonance effect and culture dynamics are solved, and more accurate prediction support is provided for applications such as social media marketing and public opinion analysis.

column12: Social network knowledge graph relation prediction method based on graph attention mechanism
column13: The invention provides a social network knowledge graph relationship prediction method based on a graph attention mechanism, and the method comprises the steps: S1, receiving a social network knowledge graph, coding entities and relationships in the social network knowledge graph, and obtaining a social network knowledge graph information code; s2, an improved graph attention mechanism model is defined, social network knowledge graph information codes serve as a data set, a meta-learning framework is used for training the data set, the meta-learning framework is divided into a base training stage and a meta-training stage, and in the base training stage, parameters of the improved graph attention mechanism model are obtained based on the data set; in the meta-training stage, hyper-parameters and entity embedding vectors of an improved graph attention mechanism model are obtained based on a data set and parameters of the improved graph attention mechanism model; and S3, inputting the entity embedding vector obtained in the step S2 into a score function, and performing relation prediction on the social network knowledge graph. According to the method, the social network knowledge graph relation prediction accuracy can be improved.

column12: Knowledge graph recommendation system fusing entity information and popularity
column13: The invention aims to provide a recommendation system capable of fully utilizing semantic information and graph structure information in a knowledge graph. The system is mainly characterized in that a calculation method of semantic similarity of entities is adopted; an entity embedding calculation method for an entity recommendation application is adopted; and semantic information and graph structure information in the graph are combined to recommend entities. The recommendation system specifically comprises an entity similarity calculation module for obtaining the similarity of entities through calculation after text information input of a knowledge graph is obtained; a graph embedded representation learning module used for obtaining embedded representations of the entities by taking the relationship between the entities in the knowledge graph as input; and an entity recommendation generation module used for fusing the similarity obtained by the entity similarity calculation module and the embedded representation obtained by the graph embedded representation learning module into a final similarity score based on click feedback data of the user, so that a recommendation application recommends entities to the user.

column12: Social network-oriented hierarchical super-dimensional knowledge graph construction method
column13: The invention belongs to the technical field of knowledge maps, and discloses a social network-oriented hierarchical super-dimensional knowledge graph construction method. Relevant information of commodities in a social network is complex and is difficult to effectively convert by using an existing knowledge graph. The method comprises the following steps: firstly, analyzing composition structures of various types of information in a social network, and defining a corresponding super-dimensional knowledge graph architecture; then extracting specific knowledge related to commodity recommendation, performing concept layering according to the property of the specific knowledge, and establishing association mapping between layers according to the corresponding relation of the specific knowledge; organizing the obtained knowledge according to the constructed structure mode to realize the conversion of multiple groups; and finally, by utilizing the obtained social network knowledge graph and combining personal preference information of a specific user, a commodity which is relatively high in matching degree with the social network knowledge graph is recommended, so that the description and organization ability of knowledge related to the commodity in the social network is improved, the expression ability of a complex multi-element social network entity relationship is improved, and clear and effective support for social network commodity recommendation can be realized.

column12: DYNAMIC KNOWLEDGE GRAPHS
column13: A computer system for dynamically updating a knowledge graph, the system comprising: an ingest layer configured to obtain further data; and an update module configured to: I-a. update the metadata associated with one or more of a plurality of nodes in the knowledge graph based on the further data, and/or I-b. generate one or more further nodes based on the further data; then II. generate an updated knowledge graph comprising an updated set of edges by forming and/or dissolving links between nodes in dependence on metadata associated with the nodes, wherein: a propensity of the update module to form edges between nodes depends on dynamically configurable connection an/or decay parameters; wherein the ingest layer and update module are configured to iteratively repeat respectively obtaining further data and performing steps I-a to II until a termination criterion is met.

column12: METHOD AND SYSTEM FOR KEYWORD SEARCH OVER A KNOWLEDGE GRAPH
column13: A computer implemented method for enhancing a knowledge graph with labels, wherein a knowledge graph comprises a large number of vertices representing entities and a large number of edges representing relations between the entities. The method comprises determining a label for each vertex, wherein the label of each vertex comprises a list of distances between said particular vertex and other vertices of the knowledge graph, wherein the distances are sorted in descending order with regard to betweenness centrality of the vertices, starting with a distance to a vertex with the highest number of edges pointing in and out of the vertex.

column12: Cross-department knowledge sharing and security isolation authority dynamic allocation method and device, computer equipment, storage medium and computer program product
column13: The invention relates to a dynamic authority allocation method and device for cross-department knowledge sharing and security isolation, computer equipment, a storage medium and a computer program product. The method comprises the steps that user access logs are collected and preprocessed, modeling is conducted on a user behavior sequence through a recurrent neural network model for the preprocessed user access logs, and a behavior analysis result is obtained; constructing an enterprise knowledge graph in combination with natural language processing and social network analysis technologies, and generating a knowledge demand evaluation result according to the enterprise knowledge graph; determining an optimal permission scheme in combination with a behavior analysis result and a knowledge demand evaluation result; according to the user access context and the behavior analysis result, matching an adaptive security isolation strategy from a preset strategy library; and executing real-time permission updating according to the optimal permission scheme and the security isolation strategy. By adopting the method, the management cost and the compliance risk can be reduced, and the method has high expandability and scene adaptability.

column12: AI-based employment social network extender
column13: An artificial-intelligence-directed social network extender for existing employees and recruiters which increases the pool of available candidates for an employer while also maximizing the effectiveness of candidate selection. In an embodiment, a recruiting manager extends the social networks of employees and recruiters to maximize the available pool of candidates for a given job opening. A first machine learning algorithm provides instructions to a crawler to gather both candidate information from the extended social network, plus corporate structure information from the Internet for privacy and conflict checking purposes. The gathered information is stored in a knowledge graph which is analyzed by a second machine learning algorithm to identify candidates and relationships most likely to produce a good fit for the job opening.

column12: Shortest path searching method and social network relation analysis method
column13: The invention discloses a shortest path searching method and a social network relation analysis method, and belongs to the technical field of network information, the social network relation analysis method comprises the steps that a knowledge graph of a social network is constructed, vertexes in the knowledge graph comprise users or entities, and edges in the knowledge graph represent the interaction relation between the vertexes; calculating a shortest path from the source point to the target point based on a shortest path searching method; wherein the source point and the target point belong to a vertex set of the knowledge graph; and obtaining a relation analysis result of the source point and the target point according to the interaction relation on the shortest path from the source point to the target point. According to the method, large-scale social network graph data with a complex structure can be efficiently and stably processed.

column12: Systems and Methods for Conversations with Devices about Media Using Voice Personality Profiles
column13: Systems and methods are described herein for providing media guidance. Control circuitry may receive a first voice input and access a database of topics to identify a first topic associated with the first voice input. A user interface may generate a first response to the first voice input, and subsequent to generating the first response, the control circuitry may receive a second voice input. The control circuitry may determine a match between the second voice input and an interruption input such as a period of silence or a keyword or a phrase, such as “Ahh,”, “Umm,”, or “Hmm.” The user interface may generate a second response that is associated with a second topic related to the first topic. By interrupting the conversation and changing the subject from time to time, media guidance systems can appear to be more intelligent and human.

column12: Efficient recommendation method based on user session and social network
column13: The invention provides a recommendation method based on a user session and a social network, and the method comprises the following steps: constructing a knowledge graph embedded network: constructing the knowledge graph embedded network which is used for obtaining the user session and is related to the social network by using the social network information and historical behavior information of a user; training and learning a heterogeneous knowledge graph network: establishing the heterogeneous knowledge graph network by utilizing the knowledge graph embedded network, and learning hidden information in users and sessions in the heterogeneous knowledge graph network; embedding personalized session features: aiming at users and session information in the heterogeneous knowledge graph network, utilizing a calculation module to obtain characterization session embedded information aiming at each user, and obtaining personal preference information of the users and context feature vectors in sessions; performing weighted summation by using the personal preferences and the context feature vectors to obtain a final calculation function of the user preferences; and in combination with the cross entropy, obtaining a final representation mode of the personal preference of the user.

column12: Developing event-specific provisional knowledge graphs
column13: Techniques and a framework are described herein for constructing and/or updating, e.g., on top of a general-purpose knowledge graph, an “event-specific provisional knowledge graph.” In various implementations, live data stream(s) may be analyzed to identify entity(s) associated with a developing event. The entity(s) may form part of a general-purpose knowledge graph that includes entity nodes and edges between the entity nodes. Based on the identified one or more entities, an event-specific provisional knowledge graph may be constructed or updated in association with the developing event. In some implementations, the event-specific provisional knowledge graph may be queried for new information about the developing event. Computing devices may be caused to render, as output, the new information.

column12: Medical knowledge graph quality evaluation system, device, equipment, medium and product
column13: The invention relates to a medical knowledge graph quality evaluation system, device and equipment, a medium and a product. The method comprises the following steps: acquiring a medical knowledge graph established based on schema; executing pre-checking operation on the medical knowledge graph, wherein the pre-checking operation at least comprises one of defined field data type checking, outlier checking and knowledge graph topological structure checking; and checking the medical knowledge graph based on community discovery of the social network and the corrected mutual information amount as evaluation indexes to obtain a medical knowledge graph evaluation result. According to the method, communities existing in different ontologies are discovered through basic algorithms of pre-checking and community discovery in a social network, and the relationship quality in the knowledge graph is measured by using the corrected mutual information.

column12: Content item audience selection
column13: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for selecting an audience for content are disclosed. In one aspect, a method includes receiving, from a content item provider, a request to distribute content items to users that have been deemed interested in a particular entity. First users that have expressed an interest in the particular entity are identified. Expansion entities for the particular entity are identified in a knowledge graph. At least one of the expansion entities can be connected to the particular entity by a relationship path. Second users are identified. The second users are deemed interested in the particular entity based on the second users having expressed an interest in an expansion entity. The content items are provided to at least a portion of the first users and at least a portion of the second users.

column12: View materialization method and system for sub-graph matching query
column13: The invention relates to subgraph matching query and view materialization operation in the field of graph databases, and discloses a view materialization method and system for subgraph matching query. The invention designs a sub-graph tree structure-based materialized view data structure, and the materialized overhead and the query optimization effect can be balanced. According to the method, a tree division algorithm is designed, and the minimum connected tree division can be efficiently calculated. The invention also designs a matched query algorithm for the data structure of the materialized view, and the materialized view can be efficiently utilized to perform query optimization. According to the view materialization method, materialization view construction can be completed at controllable space-time overhead, query answering can be greatly accelerated, and the method can be applied to the fields of financial risk control, bioinformatics, social network analysis, knowledge graph retrieval and the like.

column12: Cross-social network account matching method based on knowledge graph label propagation
column13: The invention discloses a cross-social network account matching method based on knowledge graph label propagation, and the method comprises the following steps: S1, obtaining user account data on two social network platforms, and constructing a user knowledge graph of the user account data; s2, performing false label propagation based on the degrees of the nodes in the knowledge graph; and S3, label propagation based on user information similarity: taking the'to-be-matched node 'as a center, firstly positioning the'bridging node' of the'to-be-matched node ', then constructing a potential matching node set by adopting a'first-order neighbor union set' through a matching relationship of the bridging node, and completing label updating and propagation based on the user information similarity. According to the method, different social network user data are directly processed and associated from the perspective of the graph, and the accuracy of cross-platform social network account matching is remarkably improved by deeply mining the topological relation and semantic information of the nodes and the connecting edges in the knowledge graph.

column12: Systems and methods for semantic analysis based on knowledge graph
column13: The present disclosure relates to a method for semantic analysis performed by a computing device in the financial field. The method includes constructing a knowledge graph with a computer device. The method further includes obtaining, by the computer device, information published by the first user on a social network over the network. The method further includes the computer device generating standard information based on the information. The method further includes generating, by the computer device, a user behavior based on the standard information and the knowledge graph. The method further includes searching, by the computer device, for another user with similar user behavior based on the user behavior.

column12: Knowledge graph enhanced recommendation system based on sparse user behavior data
column13: The invention provides a knowledge graph enhanced recommendation system based on sparse user behavior data, which is used for completing high-accuracy user interest mining in a sparse user historical behavior record data scene so as to generate a user recommendation result related to user interest and recommend the user recommendation result to a user, and is characterized by comprising: a user interest mining module that is used for mining user behavior data of each user so as to obtain a preliminary recommendation result corresponding to user interests; and the recommendation result rearrangement module that is used for rearranging and adjusting the preliminary recommendation result so as to obtain a user recommendation result more conforming to user interests, wherein the user interest mining module comprises a preprocessing part, a user portrait construction part, a semantic extension part, a label pool construction part, a label filtering part and a label sampling part; the recommendation result rearrangement module comprises an access object extension part and a recommendation result adjustment part.

column12: Method and system for conducting ecommerce transactions in messaging via search, discussion and agent prediction
column13: A computer-implemented method of using the Internet to promote goods and services and connect merchants with potential purchasers in chat groups who wish to obtain suitable sources of goods and services is provided, wherein a plurality of users each have a computer device provided with chat application software and software for accessing and interactively communicating via a computer network with a server provided with a search engine for searching the Internet. Users initiate a chat conversation among a group of users. One of the users invokes a search application using the search engine. The user conducts a search of the Internet for products or services, reviews the results of the search, selects a product or service located by the search, and shares the selected search result with the chat conversation. One of the users can order the selected product or service as part of the process.

column12: Social network abnormal behavior detection method based on user behavior knowledge graph
column13: The invention discloses a social network abnormal behavior detection method based on a user behavior knowledge graph, and the method comprises the steps: integrating the user behavior data in a social network to form the user behavior knowledge graph, constructing a fourth-order tensor according to the user behavior knowledge graph, carrying out the tensor decomposition of the tensor of the user behavior knowledge graph, and obtaining the abnormal behavior of the social network. The method comprises the following steps of: constructing a behavior reconstruction model, calculating to obtain each behavior embedding vector, forming a training sample set by the behavior embedding vectors corresponding to normal user behaviors, training the constructed behavior reconstruction model, finally inputting the behavior embedding vector to be detected into the trained behavior reconstruction model, and comparing a reconstruction error with a threshold value to obtain an abnormal behavior detection result. According to the invention, the accuracy of abnormal behavior detection can be effectively improved.

column12: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR IDENTIFYING IMPLICIT CAUSAL RELATIONSHIPS FROM MEDICAL REPORTS USING SOCIAL NETWORK ANALYSIS
column13: The present invention identifies implicit causal relationships by analysing relationships between entities from medical reports such as medical history and patient personal profile. The system (100) of the present invention for indentifying implicit causal relationships from medical reports using network analysis comprises knowledge base; and at least five modules. The at least five modules comprising a term extraction module for extracting a set of terms with entity type identification from document set using entity recognition; a semantic parsing module for performing semantic parsing to identify relevant matching concepts from ontological resources using semantic matching; a network generation module for identifying co-occurrence relations and building network based on co-occurrence relations; an importance analysis module for determining importance measure of terms using social network analysis functions; and a causal relations extraction module for executing entity type analysis to identify implicit cause-effect relations. The present invention discovers hidden associations which are not apparent among terms and concepts of medical reports through generation of semantic network of concepts from medical reports and to perform importance analysis and entity type analysis.

column12: RECOMMENDER SYSTEM FOR TIME-DEPENDENT ACTIONS BASED ON TEMPORAL KNOWLEDGE GRAPHS
column13: A recommender system for providing recommendations to users based on a state of interest comprises: an AI unit (104) configured to organize domain of interest (106) information in an initial temporal Knowledge Graph KGt, where t is a timestamp that refers to the present point in time; a prediction component (108) configured to predict, for at least one future point in time t + x, future entities, future links between entities and/or future attributes of entities for the initial Knowledge Graph KGt and to produce at least one new Knowledge Graph KGt+x based on the predictions; a diachronic analyzer (112) configured to simulate situations resulting from the execution of a particular action or a combination of actions at certain points in time and to predict expected temporal Knowledge Graphs for the simulated situations; a graph analyzer (110) configured to classify the Knowledge Graphs produced for the respective points in time and for the simulated situations based on the state of interest; and an evaluation module (114) configured to provide, based on the classification result, a ranked list of recommended actions.

column12: Social network suicide idea detection method and system
column13: The invention provides a social network suicide idea detection method and system. The social network suicide idea detection method comprises the steps of obtaining a suicide risk individual knowledgegraph; and based on the suicide risk individual knowledge graph and a double-layer attention mechanism, obtaining user suicide idea key influence factors, constructing a graph neural network based ona social network, and performing calculation by the graph neural network to obtain a user suicide judgment result. By constructing the individual knowledge graph based on the suicide risk and establishing the double-layer attention mechanism, the problems that data are not easy to obtain and the data are rare in suicide idea analysis in the social network are effectively solved.

column12: Recommendation method, system and equipment fusing social network and knowledge graph
column13: The invention discloses a recommendation method, system and equipment fusing a social network and a knowledge graph. Influence factors of users and articles are mined from the social network and the knowledge graph, similar users and similar articles are calculated, and the similar users and similar articles are fused into a conventional matrix decomposition recommendation model to form a new recommendation model. The technical problem that in an existing recommendation system, the data sparsity and the cold start problem affect the recommendation performance is solved.

column12: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR CONVERSATIONS WITH DEVICES ABOUT MEDIA USING VOICE PERSONALITY PROFILES
column13: Systems and methods are described herein for providing media guidance. Control circuitry may receive a first voice input and access a database of topics to identify a first topic associated with the first voice input. A user interface may generate a first response to the first voice input, and subsequent to generating the first response, the control circuitry may receive a second voice input. The control circuitry may determine a match between the second voice input and an interruption input such as a period of silence or a keyword or a phrase, such as “Ahh,”, “Umm,”, or “Hmm.” The user interface may generate a second response that is associated with a second topic related to the first topic. By interrupting the conversation and changing the subject iron time to time, media guidance systems can appear to be more intelligent and human.

column12: Node injection attack method based on adaptive target selection
column13: The invention relates to a node injection attack method based on adaptive target selection, and the method comprises the following steps: S1, target node selection: calculating a comprehensive score of a node based on uncertainty and topology centrality, and dynamically selecting a target node set of a current attack round; s2, feature generation: using an adaptive feature generator to generate node features which are similar to target node distribution and have strong aggressiveness; and S3, disturbance edge construction: selecting an optimal disturbance edge connection mode for the injection node according to strategy network output in reinforcement learning. According to the method, the attack flexibility can be improved through dynamic target selection, the attack performance can be remarkably enhanced through combination of disturbance characteristics and structures, and the method has good concealment, expandability and generalization ability. The method is widely applied to security evaluation and defense research fields related to graph neural networks, such as social network analysis, recommendation systems, knowledge graphs and the like.

column12: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR A PERSONALIZED DIALOGUE SYSTEM USING KNOWLEDGE-BASED ENTITY SERVICES
column13: A speech recognition system includes a microphone configured to receive a speech input from one or more users and a processor in communication with the microphone. The processor is programmed to parse a plurality of candidate speech recognition results from a speech input from a user, extract one or more entities from the plurality of candidate speech recognition results, based on natural language understanding (NLU) information, select and retrieve data indicative of information of the one or more entities from a remote server, update a personal knowledge graph associated with a user profile of the user utilizing the data indicative of information of the one or more entities, and output a response to the speech input utilizing the user profile.

column12: Social network term analysis method based on knowledge graph
column13: The invention relates to the technical field of knowledge graphs, and particularly discloses a social network term analysis method based on a knowledge graph, which comprises the following steps: S1, presetting a sampling period, obtaining comments in an interval, screening out social network terms, and calculating the frequency of publishing the social network terms by a user; s2, equally dividing the interval into a plurality of sub-intervals, obtaining the sentiment polarity of the high-frequency word, calculating the proportion of positive sentiment, the proportion of negative sentiment and the proportion of neutral sentiment in the sub-intervals, and calculating the sentiment change value of the high-frequency word; and S3, dividing similar topics, recording users as root nodes, recording similar topics as first-level nodes, recording high-frequency words as second-level nodes, constructing an original tree and an original forest, and analyzing social network terms based on the original forest. According to the method, a complete mapping link from text features to group behaviors is constructed, and social network term analysis is changed from descriptive statistics to a new stage of predictive modeling by constructing an original tree and an original forest.

column12: Social network privacy attack framework based on graph data, construction method and application thereof
column13: The invention discloses a social network privacy attack framework based on graph data, a construction method and application thereof. The attack framework comprises user nodes, user attribute nodes, similarity nodes, user social relations, attribute relations and similarity relation connection categories. According to the framework, user privacy and attribute information in a social network are integrated, a social attribute network based on a graph data topological structure is constructed, user nodes are created by using identity relationships of users, social relationships of the users in the social network are represented in a knowledge graph, attribute nodes in the knowledge graph are constructed by using user attributes, and the social network is constructed. And finally, classifying connections among the nodes through a classification mechanism to realize fine granularity of the user relationship. The framework fully fuses relation information of users, namely, attribute information and similarity indexes in a topological structure and a social network, and has higher calculation and learning capabilities.

column12: Abnormal behavior detection method based on optimized graph embedding representation
column13: The invention discloses an abnormal behavior detection method based on optimized graph embedding representation, which comprises the following steps of: firstly, acquiring entity information and relation information in a social network needing abnormal behavior detection, then acquiring a plurality of groups of historical data in a normal state, generating a corresponding time sequence knowledge graph for each group of historical data, and complementing the time sequence knowledge graph; constructing a dynamic graph abnormal behavior detection model comprising a graph neural network, a reading function module, a long-short term memory network and an abnormal behavior evaluation module, and training the dynamic graph abnormal behavior detection model by adopting the time sequence knowledge graph after historical data completion, and obtaining a time sequence knowledge graph corresponding to a to-be-detected time period, and inputting the trained dynamic graph abnormal behavior detection model to obtain a detection result of whether the social network has an abnormal behavior in the to-be-detected time period. According to the method, the embedded information amount is increased while the original social network graph structure and attribute information are reserved, so that the accuracy of an abnormal behavior detection model is improved.

column12: DETERMINING EFFECTS OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE OUTPUTS ON SOCIAL NETWORKS
column13: A computer-implemented method for determining effects of artificial intelligence model outputs on a social network. The method includes generating related target features of an artificial intelligence model, and simulating outputs of the artificial intelligence model using model layer results. The method may also analyze metadata of actors of the social network. The method may use latent class analysis of the related target features, the simulated outputs, and the metadata of the social network actors to categorize predicted effects of outputs of the artificial intelligence model on actors of the social network based on a joint probability distribution between classes of the metadata of the actor and context classes of the target features of the outputs. The method may output categories of the predicted effects of the outputs on the social network actors.

column12: Knowledge graph link reasoning method
column13: The invention provides a knowledge graph link reasoning method, and belongs to the field of artificial intelligence and knowledge graphs. The method comprises the steps that a local structure is reserved through a social triple integrity hypergraph, global association is captured through a social relation semantic hypergraph, and complementary social network double hypergraph representation is constructed; based on composite feature fusion of heterogeneous interaction, homogeneous parallel interaction and overall interaction, and in combination with a hypergraph attention network, relationship-guided dynamic semantic propagation is realized; designing multi-channel comparative learning based on social data; the social triple score is optimized based on a marginal sorting loss function, and a knowledge graph link prediction task and a self-supervision comparison task are fused through a joint learning framework. The problems of insufficient local structure modeling, global semantic information splitting, weak representation generalization ability, high dependence on labeled data and the like existing in knowledge graph link prediction in an existing social network are solved, and link reasoning tasks in a dynamic, sparse and high-noise-disturbance social scene are difficult to effectively deal with.

column13: The invention discloses a knowledge graph completion method and device based on enhanced information, a medium and a product, and relates to the technical field of inductive learning, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the sub-graph extraction of a to-be-completed knowledge graph, and obtaining a closed sub-graph; respectively performing forward updating on the initial node embedding of the current node and the initial edge embedding of the current edge to obtain updated node embedding and updated edge embedding; based on the updated node embedding of each node corresponding to each relation path in the relation path set of the current closed subgraph and the updated edge embedding of each edge, determining relation path representation of the corresponding relation path; total embedding of the corresponding closed sub-graphs is determined based on all updated node embedding, all updated edge embedding and all relation path representation of each closed sub-graph; and based on the total embedding of all closed sub-graphs in the knowledge graph to be complemented, determining the complemented social network knowledge graph. According to the method, the continuously expanded social network knowledge graph can be dynamically complemented.

column12: RECRUITMENT PROCESS GRAPH BASED UNSUPERVISED ANOMALY DETECTION
column13: In some examples, recruitment process graph based unsupervised anomaly detection may include obtaining log data associated with a recruitment process for a plurality of candidates, and generating knowledge graphs and graph embeddings. The graph embeddings may be trained to include a plurality of properties such that graph embeddings of genuine candidate hires and fraudulent candidate hires are appropriately spaced in a vector space. The trained graph embeddings may be clustered to generate a plurality of embedding clusters that include a genuine candidate cluster, and a fraudulent candidate cluster. For a new candidate graph embedding for a new candidate, a determination may be made as to whether the new candidate graph embedding belongs to the genuine candidate cluster, to the fraudulent candidate cluster, or to an anomalous cluster, and instructions may be generated to respectively retain or suspend the new candidate.

column12: Semantic search method for social network data
column13: The invention relates to a semantic search method for social network data. The semantic search method comprises the following steps: acquiring an input original query statement; in the pre-trained and expanded social network data corpus, performing dynamic query semantic expansion on the original query statement by using the knowledge graph; according to the context existence condition of the query statement, ambiguity elimination is carried out on a dynamic query semantic extension result based on a knowledge graph in a social network data corpus, and a disambiguated corpus extension statement is obtained; inputting the disambiguated corpus extension statement and the original query statement into a RoBERTa pre-training model for similarity comparison, and outputting the corpus original statement corresponding to the corpus extension statement with the maximum similarity as a semantic search result of the original query statement; the RoBERTa pre-training model is obtained based on pre-training of a social network data corpus. The semantic search accuracy of the social network data can be greatly improved.

column12: Character relationship knowledge graph construction method and device, medium and product
column13: The invention discloses a character relationship knowledge graph construction method and device, a medium and a product, and relates to the field of data processing. According to the method, a neighborhood-oriented packaging scheme and a suspension marking technology are used for identifying and marking an entity span in a tweet statement, a hypergraph neural network is combined with message passing to carry out high-order reasoning, finally entity nodes and relation nodes in a hypergraph are classified, and cross entropy loss is used for supervising prediction of entities and relations. Therefore, the relation between the figure and the entity in the large-scale social network is obtained, so that the extraction of the figure entity and the relation is more accurate, and the building of the figure relation knowledge graph is more accurate. On the basis, enterprises are helped to construct and maintain the social network data-based character relationship knowledge graph more effectively, deeper insight is provided for the enterprises, and more accurate information basis can be provided for business decision making, so that social network strategy, marketing, user relationship management and the like of the enterprises are promoted.

column12: Atlas-based recommendation method and system, storage medium and electronic equipment
column13: The invention discloses an atlas-based recommendation method and system, a storage medium and electronic equipment. The recommendation method comprises the following steps: a user feature acquisitionstep: constructing and acquiring social network atlas user features through a social network atlas; an article feature obtaining step: constructing and obtaining knowledge graph article features through a knowledge graph; a fusion step: respectively fusing the social network map user features and the knowledge map article features with recommended user features and recommended article features toobtain recommended user hidden features and recommended article hidden features; and a recommendation step: outputting a recommendation value according to the recommended user hidden features and therecommended article hidden features. By introducing the social network map, the problem of lack of information is solved; and meanwhile, the problem that potential features cannot be fully extracted is solved by using the convolutional neural network.

column12: Personalized recommendation method based on knowledge graph and SPN network
column13: The invention relates to the technical field of preference recommendation, in particular to a personalized recommendation method based on a knowledge graph and an SPN network, and the method comprises the steps: obtaining a social network related to a target user, user-article interaction and an article attribute knowledge graph, inputting the knowledge graph into a preset recommendation model, and outputting a personalized recommendation result of the target user. The recommendation model comprises a user feature extraction module used for calculating similarity and introducing comparative learning to optimize and reconstruct a social network, obtaining an SPN network and extracting user features; the article feature extraction module is used for extracting article features through user-article interaction and enhancing the article features by using a cross compression unit based on an article attribute knowledge graph to obtain enhanced article features; and the matching calculation recommendation module is used for calculating a matching score based on the user features and the enhanced article features and generating a recommendation result. According to the method, the performance of the recommendation model is improved by considering the propagation of social influence and the semantic relationship of article attributes.

column12: Crowdsourcing test report fusion method and system based on knowledge graph
column13: The invention discloses a crowdsourcing test report fusion method and a crowdsourcing test report fusion system based on a knowledge graph, which belong to the field of software testing and are characterized in that a demand knowledge graph and a test report knowledge graph are constructed, and a crowdsourcing test report is meticulously analyzed by utilizing social technology consistency measurement so as to determine a test report with relatively high consistency. column12: Hot event knowledge graph link estimation method based on social networking platform
column13: The invention belongs to the technical field of social networking platform prediction, and particularly relates to a hot event knowledge graph link estimation method based on a social networking platform. The method comprises the steps of obtaining historical data of related fields of a hotspot event, performing data cleaning, information extraction and information integration, and constructing a graph database; a dictionary and an index are established through data preprocessing, data are trained, a completion model is obtained, a hot event knowledge graph is completed, and the like. Compared with a traditional method, the method has the advantages that the interaction information between the event and the relationship is more fully captured, so that a more accurate link estimation effect is achieved.

column12: METHOD AND APPARATUS FOR MISSING LINK PREDICTION FOR KNOWLEDGE GRAPH
column13: A method, apparatus, system and computer-readable medium for missing link prediction for a knowledge graph are presented. A method (100) can include following steps: predicting (S101) at least one missing link in a first knowledge graph; for each missing link, measuring (S102) effect on the first knowledge graph by adding the missing link, displaying (S103) the measured effect to a user, receiving (S104) the user's decision on whether to add the missing link based on the measured effect, and processing (S105) the first knowledge graph according to the user's decision. With the solution provided, data quality of a knowledge graph can be improved.

column12: Content item audience selection
column13: Methods, systems, and apparatus, including computer programs encoded on a computer storage medium, for selecting an audience for content are disclosed. In one aspect, a method includes receiving, from a content item provider, a request to distribute content items to users that have been deemed interested in a particular entity. First users that have expressed an interest in the particular entity are identified. Expansion entities for the particular entity are identified in a knowledge graph. At least one of the expansion entities can be connected to the particular entity by a relationship path. Second users are identified. The second users are deemed interested in the particular entity based on the second users having expressed an interest in an expansion entity. The content items are provided to at least a portion of the first users and at least a portion of the second users.

column12: Automobile financial risk control question answering method based on social network enhanced retrieval
column13: The invention is suitable for the technical field of automobile finance risk control, and provides an automobile finance risk control question answering method based on social network enhanced retrieval, which comprises the following steps: step 1, construction of a human-vehicle combined social network, including construction of a human-vehicle combined knowledge graph and construction of a public opinion information-based knowledge graph; step 2, graph guide retrieval based on the social network, including query enhancement, graph retrieval based on an expansion path and knowledge enhancement; and step 3, automobile financial risk control question answering based on a large model, including retrieval result rewriting and answer generation based on knowledge enhancement. The social network is constructed by integrating related data of people and vehicles, and the large model of automobile financial risk control question answering is created by adopting a graph retrieval enhancement technology; and business personnel without professional modeling ability can effectively identify the potential financial risk of the loan applicant in the form of natural language questions and answers.

column12: AUTHENTICATION METHOD
column13: An authentication method is disclosed in which a knowledge graph is provided for a user, wherein nodes of the knowledge graph represent entities associated with the user and edges of the knowledge graph represent semantic relationships between the entities. The method involves selecting a first node of the knowledge graph, identifying a second node of the knowledge graph such that information associated with the second node has a higher expected obviousness to the user than to an attacker, and generating an authentication challenge for the user based on the information associated with the second node. Also disclosed are a corresponding data processing apparatus, computer program and computer-readable data carrier.

column12: Knowledge path guidance-based Tutt platform account number classification method
column13: The invention discloses a Tutt platform account classification method based on knowledge path guidance, which comprises the following steps of: firstly, constructing a social network knowledge graph aiming at a Tutt platform, then proposing an account similarity index based on a knowledge path, and calculating Tutt account similarity based on the knowledge path; and finally, constructing a graph convolutional network account classification model guided by a knowledge path, and completing Tutt platform account classification. According to the method, the social network knowledge path is provided through the constructed Tutt platform social network knowledge graph, the association similarity between accounts in a social network scene is effectively measured, the account similarity index based on the knowledge path is constructed, the contribution of the association entity in the knowledge path to the account similarity is innovatively measured, and the user experience is improved. Compared with an existing similarity index, the method is more in line with the classification of Tutt platform accounts, and the knowledge path-guided Tutt platform account classification model takes the similarity based on the knowledge path as the weight of feature transmission between the accounts, so that a more accurate account classification effect can be achieved.

column12: Social network specific target account mining method for military field
column13: The invention provides a military field-oriented social network specific target account mining method. The method comprises the following steps of selecting a seed account and adding the seed account into a seed account pool; performing data acquisition on the seed account; processing the collected seed account data by using a natural language processing technology and an image recognition technology; grading and grading the seed accounts by using the data collected by the seed accounts and the processed data; for the account with a higher score, adding the account as a seed account into the seed account pool again, and repeating; when a certain level or account data set is collected, the account discovery part stops; constructing a social network knowledge graph; and mining the specific target account by adopting the social network knowledge graph. According to the method, through a mechanism of scoring and evaluating seed accounts, high-quality accounts are found, the acquisition quantity is effectively controlled, the method focuses on accounts with high association degree of acquisition targets, and acquisition resources are saved.

column12: Multi-modal user emotion analysis method based on knowledge graph
column13: The invention provides a multi-modal user emotion analysis method based on a knowledge graph. The method comprises the steps of acquiring an emotion analysis service request of a user is received or authorization of social network data of the monitored user applied to emotion analysis service; acquiring user social network data, establishing a user graph model based on the user social network data, the user graph model comprises a data graph DGraph, an information graph IGraph and a knowledge graph KGraph, and storing DDIK, IDIK and KDIK resources respectively; extracting an interactive relationship tuple Inter (user) of the user and other people from the user graph model, substituting the Inter (user) into the function for calculation, and analyzing the emotional tendency of the user according to a calculation result; and sending the emotion tendency analysis result to the corresponding user. According to the method, the emotional tendency of the user can be analyzed based on massivesocial network data under the condition that the user does not perceive, so that the user is helped to know the emotional tendency situation in time, and emotional disorders are prevented.

column12: APPARATUS AND METHOD FOR FILLING A KNOWLEDGE GRAPH BY WAY OF STRATEGIC DATA SPLITS
column13: A method for filling a knowledge graph. A first and second subset of data points are determined. A data point to which a label is assigned is associated with a cluster from among a set of clusters, depending on whether a distribution of labels from data points that are already associated with the cluster satisfies a condition. Data points that are associated with the cluster are associated with the first or second subset. Models for classification are trained depending on data points from the first subset. For at least one of the models, a value of a quality factor is determined depending on data points from the second subset. A model for classification is selected from the models depending on the value. A classification that defines a relationship, node, or type of node in the knowledge graph for the sentence is determined using the selected model.

column12: Distributed entity re-resolution based on streaming updates
column13: Mechanisms are provided for dynamic re-resolution of entities in a knowledge graph (KG) based on streaming updates. The KG and corresponding initial clusters associated with first entities are received along with a dynamic data stream having second documents referencing second entities. Clustering on the second documents based on the set of initial clusters, and document features of the second documents, is performed to provide a set of second document clusters. For second document clusters that should be modified based on entities associated with the second document cluster, a cluster modification operation is performed. Updated clusters are generated based on the clustering and modification of clusters. Entity re-resolution is dynamically performed on the entities in the KG based on the second entities associated with the updated clusters to generate an updated knowledge graph data structure.

column12: DETECTING DATA LEAKAGE AND/OR DETECTING DANGEROUS INFORMATION
column13: Aspects relate to a computer implemented method, a computer program and a computer system for detecting data leakage and/or detecting dangerous information. column12: DETECTING INFECTION SOURCES
column13: A method, computer program product, and system include a processor(s) obtains various data relevant to one or more infected individuals (e.g., location data and infection data. The processor(s) identifies relationships and physical proximity between people comprising the one or more infected individuals and additional individuals, based on the various data. The processor(s) generates, based on the various data, a geofence. The processor(s) utilizes the geofence, the relationships, the physical proximity, and the various data, to predict that a portion of the additional individuals are more likely than not to be infected with the infection. The processor(s) generates a scoring model to identify a source of the infection. The processor(s) applies the scoring model to a group consisting of the one or more individuals, the portion of the additional individuals, and the physical locations, to identify the source of the infection (i.e., a person or physical locations).

column12: Microblog event popularity prediction method based on knowledge graph
column13: The invention relates to a knowledge graph-based microblog event popularity prediction method, which comprises the following steps of: firstly, crawling blog articles and user data under a certain microblog topic, establishing a social network knowledge graph for microblog data, then performing time interval division on event data, establishing a dynamic topic model on the time interval, and finally, predicting the popularity of a microblog event according to the dynamic topic model. And through a knowledge fusion module, utilizing a graph convolutional network and a recurrent neural network to predict microblog event popularity. According to the method, the defect that trend and periodicity of intrinsic topological features and public opinion features of a social network are ignored in an existing public opinion event popularity prediction process is overcome, a reference scheme is provided for the event popularity prediction method, and the accuracy of popularity prediction is improved.

A knowledge graph representing information in the multiple datasets may be constructed and an entity resolution algorithm executed. A further de-identification may be performed for patient nodes that have a re-identification risk exceeding a re-identification risk threshold.

column12: System and method for de-biasing graphical information
column13: A method for graphical information de-biasing is described. The method includes detecting biased graphical information presented to a user. The method also includes generating a neutral version of the biased graphical information to form de-biased graphical information. The method further includes displaying the de-biased graphical information to the user, including highlighted components of the de-biased graphical information.

column12: SYSTEM AND METHODS FOR FEATURE ENGINEERING BASED ON GRAPH LEARNING
column13: In one embodiment, a computing system may receive query information associated with a machine-learning model. The system may access a knowledge graph that defines relationships between a number of machine-learning models and a number of features of the machine-learning models. The system may determine, based on the knowledge graph and the query information, one or more correlation metrics indicating correlations between the machine-learning model and one or more features of the features in the knowledge graph. The system may determine one or more recommended features for the machine-learning model based on the one or more correlation metrics and the one or more features.

column12: Federal recommendation method and system based on knowledge graph attention network
column13: The invention discloses a federal recommendation method and system based on a knowledge graph attention network, and relates to the technical field of information processing, and the method comprises the steps: constructing an interaction graph between a user and a project, a social relation graph between users, and a knowledge graph between the project and an entity to which the project belongs; inputting the interaction graph, the social relation graph and the knowledge graph into a neural network, and encoding the users, the items and the entities through an embedding layer to obtain embedding of the users, the items and the entities; the embedding vectors of the users and the items are calculated through the interaction graph, the neighbor embedding of the users is aggregated through the social relation graph, and the final embedding representation of the users is obtained; the neighbor embedding of the project is aggregated by using the knowledge graph to obtain the final embedding representation of the project, so that the score of the user to the project is predicted to recommend the project; according to the method, by integrating the user behavior graph, the social network graph and the knowledge graph, the accuracy of capturing user preferences and project similarity is improved.

column12: Song recommendation method based on graph neural network and knowledge graph
column13: A song recommendation method based on a graph neural network and a knowledge graph comprises the steps that firstly, an embedded vector of a user in an interaction graph is calculated in combination with a user-song interaction graph and the song knowledge graph, then an embedded vector of the user in a social graph is calculated through a user social graph, and a final user embedded vector is obtained through embedded calculation in combination with the user-song interaction graph and the song knowledge graph. And then a final song embedding vector is calculated by combining the song embedding vector in the song knowledge graph and the song embedding vector in the user-song interaction graph. And finally, calculating possible scores of the user on the songs through the final user embedded vector and the final song embedded vector, and obtaining a predicted ranking result of the songs recommended to the user according to the scores from high to low. The importance of external auxiliary information in a recommendation system is considered, the knowledge graph and social network information are introduced, the accuracy is high, and the recommendation effect is good.

column12: Social network knowledge perception recommendation method, program and system based on anti-factual reasoning, and storage medium
column13: The invention discloses a social network knowledge perception recommendation method based on anti-factual reasoning, a program, a system and a storage medium. The system comprises an anti-fact data generation device, a data screening device, a reward feedback device and a recommendation device. According to the method, anti-fact reasoning is introduced into a knowledge perception recommendation system based on a knowledge graph, more diversified anti-fact data is generated by utilizing project feature information in the knowledge graph, and the anti-fact reasoning is popularized to a wider application scene from a sequential recommendation task; the influence of false correlation in a knowledge perception recommendation system is relieved, meanwhile, the method serves as a data enhancement method to relieve the problem of data sparseness, the model achieves a better effect, and the method can be widely applied to the application fields such as data recommendation in a social network scene.

column12: Intelligent information analysis method and system and storage medium
column13: The invention discloses an intelligent information analysis method and system and a storage medium, and relates to the field of artificial intelligence, and the method comprises the steps: carrying out the preprocessing of a policy file, and obtaining the key content of a policy; a natural language processing technology is used to train a policy index automatic extraction model, and the natural language processing technology mainly comprises named entity identification and relation extraction; automatically analyzing the policy text into an index triple according to the policy index automatic extraction model; constructing a policy index knowledge graph, and storing index triple information by using a graph database; and policy knowledge query: providing policy index knowledge query service for enterprises. According to the method, the problem that policy text interpretation is difficult is effectively solved, the policy index triad is used for representing the policy file, the knowledge graph is constructed for storing policy information, key information of the policy text can be automatically extracted and stored, and services such as policy knowledge query can be provided.

column12: SYSTEMS AND METHODS FOR FEDERATED LEARNING
column13: In one embodiment, one or more computing systems may generate a knowledge graph representing relationships between a global model and a number of local models for updating the global model. Each local model may have access to a local dataset for machine-learning training. The systems may access, from the knowledge graph, a sharing policy associated with the local dataset of a first local model. The systems may determine, based on the knowledge graph and one or more pre-determined criteria, that the sharing policy permits the local dataset of the first local model to be shared with a second local model. The system may cause the second local model to be trained using at least the local dataset of the first local model and the local dataset of the second local model. The system may update the global model using the trained second local model.

column12: Instance learning-based graph domain adaptive node classification method
column13: The invention is applicable to the technical field of knowledge migration, and provides a graph domain adaptive node classification method based on instance learning, which comprises the following steps of: acquiring a source domain data set with a mark and a target domain data set without a mark; the representation of the source domain data set and the representation of the target domain data set are learned through a GNN model, modeling is conducted on the source domain data set and the target domain data set, and embedded vectors of the source domain data set and the target domain data set are obtained; the embedded vectors of the target domain data set are classified through KNN, and target domain category pseudo labels are obtained; performing fine-grained instance contrast learning on embedded vectors of the source domain graph data set and the target domain graph data set; and after classification is finished, displaying a final classification result of the target domain graph data set. According to the method, the defects of an existing graph domain adaptation technology in cross-domain tasks are overcome, and the method has wide applicability and can be applied to graph data analysis tasks in various cross-domain scenes, such as social network analysis, recommendation systems, knowledge graphs and biological networks.

column12: DEVELOPING EVENT-SPECIFIC PROVISIONAL KNOWLEDGE GRAPHS
column13: Techniques and a framework are described herein for constructing and/or updating, e.g., on top of a general-purpose knowledge graph, an “event-specific provisional knowledge graph.” In various implementations, live data stream(s) may be analyzed to identify entity(s) associated with a developing event. The entity(s) may form part of a general-purpose knowledge graph that includes entity nodes and edges between the entity nodes. Based on the identified one or more entities, an event-specific provisional knowledge graph may be constructed or updated in association with the developing event. In some implementations, the event-specific provisional knowledge graph may be queried for new information about the developing event. Computing devices may be caused to render, as output, the new information.

column12: Generating graph databases using large language models
column13: A computer-implemented method for generating a graph database includes generating a prompt for input to a large language model (LLM) based on user input and stored metadata. The LLM is used to extract graph metadata from the prompt, generate a knowledge graph based on the graph metadata and additional sources of data, and further generate a graph data model including both structured and unstructured data using the knowledge graph. A graph platform is used to generating a graph using the graph data model.

column12: FAILURE PREDICTION VIA GRAPH REPRESENTATION OF ERROR CODES
column13: Systems/techniques that facilitate failure prediction via graph representation of error codes are provided. A system can access a medical scanner having a plurality of instrumented hardware parts, each monitored by a respective set of sensors and configured to produce respective error codes in response to respective combinations of measurements from its sensors. The system can construct a sequence of order-of-receipt knowledge graphs based on monitoring the instrumented hardware parts over a sequence of time intervals, each node of each graph representing a respective error code producible by the instrumented hardware parts, and each edge of each graph representing an order in which two respective error codes are produced by the instrumented hardware parts during a respective time interval. The system can generate a maintenance prediction for at least one instrumented hardware part, based on executing a deep learning neural network on the sequence of order-of-receipt knowledge graphs.

column12: Social relation network construction and expansion method based on topic knowledge graph
column13: The invention relates to a social relation network construction and expansion method based on a topic knowledge graph, and relates to the technical field of social networks and knowledge graphs. According to the invention, on the basis of crawling topics and user data, a social relation network construction and expansion method based on a topic knowledge graph is researched, and user resource recommendation is carried out in combination with filtering of multiple types of social relations of comment accounts under topics concerned by users in the social relation process of the users, so that interference of invalid user information on user recommendation is avoided. From another perspective, more detailed user social relation strength information can help to optimize various services of socialized media, and the usability of the services is enhanced.

column12: SYSTEM AND METHOD FOR MERGING MULTIPLE DE-IDENTIFIED MEDICAL DATASETS
column13: Some embodiments are directed to merging multiple de-identified medical datasets. A knowledge graph representing information in the multiple datasets may be constructed and an entity resolution algorithm executed. column12: Cryptocurrency transaction fund flow analysis method and system
column13: The present application relates to analyzing a transaction flow of cryptocurrency. column12: METHOD, DEVICE, AND PROGRAM PRODUCT FOR MANAGING KNOWLEDGE GRAPHS
column13: The present disclosure relates to a method, a device, and a program product for managing knowledge graphs. In a method, a historical sequence of knowledge graphs is obtained, wherein the historical sequence includes a plurality of historical knowledge graphs respectively associated with a plurality of historical time points, and a historical knowledge graph in the plurality of historical knowledge graphs includes a plurality of nodes and at least one edge between the plurality of nodes. Based on nodes and edges included in the plurality of historical knowledge graphs, a plurality of subgraphs respectively associated with the plurality of historical knowledge graphs are determined. A sequence feature associated with the historical sequence of the knowledge graphs is determined based on the plurality of subgraphs. A prediction model is trained based on the sequence feature such that the prediction model can describe the correlation among the plurality of historical knowledge graphs.
